hero.headline: Your Voice-Powered Wellness Companion
hero.subheadline: WellFlow guides you through breathing exercises, mindfulness sessions, and daily wellness routines — all hands-free, just by speaking.

voice.title: Voice Interaction
voice.desc: Speak naturally to start sessions, set reminders, and get guidance — no tapping required.

breathing.title: Breathing Exercises
breathing.desc: Guided breathing techniques to reduce stress and improve focus in minutes.

mindfulness.title: Mindfulness Sessions
mindfulness.desc: Personalized meditation and mindfulness practices tailored to your mood and schedule.

stress.title: Stress Relief
stress.desc: Evidence-based techniques to help you unwind and recover from daily stressors.

reminders.title: Routine Reminders
reminders.desc: Smart reminders that adapt to your habits and nudge you toward consistent wellness routines.

healthSync.title: Health Sync
healthSync.desc: Seamlessly syncs with Apple Health and Google Fit to give you a complete wellness picture.

wearable.title: Wearable Integration
wearable.desc: Connect your smartwatch or fitness tracker for real-time biometric-aware sessions.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Join a supportive community of wellness seekers sharing goals, tips, and encouragement.

steps.title: Set Up in Seconds
steps.desc: Download WellFlow, create your profile, and connect your preferred health apps and devices.

steps.title: Speak Your Intent
steps.desc: Simply say what you need — 'I need to relax' or 'Start a 5-minute breathing session' — and WellFlow listens.

steps.title: Receive Guided Responses
steps.desc: WellFlow responds with a personalized, voice-guided wellness session tailored to your current state.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.desc: Review your wellness journey with detailed insights, streaks, and progress reports over time.

integrations.title: Works With Your Favorite Apps
integrations.intro: Connect WellFlow to the tools you already use for a seamless, unified wellness experience.

testimonials.title: Loved by Thousands
testimonials.aggregate: 4.8 out of 5 stars from over 12,000 reviews

footer.tagline: Your voice-powered path to daily wellness.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. By accepting, you consent to our use of analytics cookies.
